title: Lavauxia primiveris

Lavauxia primiveris is further classified under the family Lathraeaceae, which is part of the larger clade of angiosperms. This plant is native to New Caledonia and is closely related to other species within the same family. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the Santalales order.
